---
title: "Heartsease, or, The Brother’s Wife. 2 vols. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Heartsease, or, The Brother’s Wife. 2 vols. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1854
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son West Strand, London.

### Notes

‘Last Heartsease Leaves’ is a short sequel which seems to have been the original ending of the novel.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
